DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose stockpile-scan and teleport diagnostics to the BepInEx console. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.performance_smoothness.name: Performance Smoothness
cfg.performance_smoothness.desc: If you notice brief hitches when entering a new area on an older PC, try lowering this. Lower = smoother but the mod takes slightly longer to notice newly-built stockpiles. Higher = faster catch-up but can cause a small hitch on slow hardware. Leave at the default if everything feels smooth.
cfg.teleport_to_dump_site_when_full.name: Teleport To Dump Site When Full
cfg.teleport_to_dump_site_when_full.desc: When every stockpile is full, send overflow timber/ore/stone/marble to your designated dump site instead of dropping it at your feet.
cfg.immersive_mode.name: Immersive Mode
cfg.immersive_mode.desc: When on, teleporting excess resources costs a small amount of energy. Turn off to make teleports free.
cfg.designated_timber_location.name: Designated Timber Location
cfg.designated_timber_location.desc: World position timber piles up at when stockpiles are full. Easiest to set with the keybind in-game rather than editing by hand.
cfg.designated_ore_location.name: Designated Ore Location
cfg.designated_ore_location.desc: World position ore piles up at when stockpiles are full. Easiest to set with the keybind in-game.
cfg.designated_stone_location.name: Designated Stone Location
cfg.designated_stone_location.desc: World position stone and marble pile up at when stockpiles are full. Easiest to set with the keybind in-game.
cfg.set_timber_location_keybind.name: Set Timber Location Keybind
cfg.set_timber_location_keybind.desc: Keybind for saving your current position as the Timber dump location.
cfg.set_ore_location_keybind.name: Set Ore Location Keybind
cfg.set_ore_location_keybind.desc: Keybind for saving your current position as the Ore dump location.
cfg.set_stone_location_keybind.name: Set Stone Location Keybind
cfg.set_stone_location_keybind.desc: Keybind for saving your current position as the Stone/Marble dump location.
cfg.toggle_teleport_keybind.name: Toggle Teleport Keybind
cfg.toggle_teleport_keybind.desc: Keybind for quickly toggling the teleport-to-dump-site-when-full option on or off without opening the settings.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
